evals.prompt: Migrate my TW3 project to TW4. I have a tailwind.config.js with custom colors, a postcss setup, and use @tailwind directives in my CSS.
evals.expected_output: Agent provides a step-by-step migration: directives → @import, config colors → @theme, postcss → @tailwindcss/vite or @tailwindcss/postcss
expectations: Recommends @tailwindcss/vite for Vite projects or @tailwindcss/postcss for others
Provides a clear step-by-step migration order

evals.prompt: My code uses bg-opacity-50, text-opacity-75, and ring-opacity-25. These stopped working after upgrading to TW4.
evals.expected_output: Agent explains deprecated opacity utilities and provides the /XX modifier replacement for each
expectations: Identifies bg-opacity, text-opacity, ring-opacity as deprecated in TW4
Provides the /XX modifier syntax as replacement
Covers all three opacity types mentioned

evals.prompt: I have a tailwind plugin that uses addUtilities and addVariant. How do I migrate it to TW4?
evals.expected_output: Agent shows conversion from JavaScript plugin API to CSS-native @utility and @custom-variant directives
expectations: Shows before/after JavaScript vs CSS comparison
Explains that the JavaScript plugin API is replaced by CSS-native directives
